title: Mini Nuke!
description: This mod adds a nuclear bomb to the Minecraft game.
body:
This mod adds a mini nuclear bomb to Minecraft, which has an explosion slightly larger than TNT. Once placed on the ground, the bomb cannot be broken, or it will immediately explode. 

If you are downloading this mod, it is important to know that I am inexperienced in creating mods and there may be some bugs or unexpected issues.
